/AJW/CH1:SP 2Y:L /X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 108 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,   54 SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF 162 DAYS,/DEF:DOES QUALIFY UNDER THEPROVISION OF 4019/X:RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,462,23 TO JESUS RAMIREZ/X:CR-110 SIGNED AND FILED/STATES/DNA/SECFEE/ICNA/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/
/CAL:PTC/VD:02-19-10/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:  1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/ARBUCKLE/REMA/TWS/PRES: 02-18-10/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:JESUS RAMIREZ,SFPD OFFICER STEPHEN GIRTSCH,SFPD OFFICER PATRICK MCNICHOL AND INSPECTOR RICARDO GALANDE  /EXHMA:PEOPLE 1- PHOTO WITH MALE,NO SHIRT WITH BLOOD ON CHEST,PEOPLE 2- PHOTO OF MALE LAYING DOWN WITH INJURIES TO SIDE,PEOPLE -4 SUBPOENA ENVELOPE AND CONTENTS FROM SF GENERAL FOR JESUS RAMIREZ AND PEOPLE 5-MANILLA SUBPOENA ENVELOPEAND CONTENT(15 PAGE DOCUMENTS)FROM SF GENERAL OF JUAN RAMIREZ,PEOPLE 6- PEOPLE'S COPY OF SUBPOENA OF PEOPLE 5/HTA1:3 & 4/871D:1 & 2/X:COURT FINDS ALLEGATIONS IN COUNT 3 & COUNT 4 IS TRUE/BAIL:400000/CTORD:ALL EXHIBITS ARERETURNED TO SUBMITTING PARTY FOR SAFEKEEPING EXCEPTPEOPLE'S 4 & 5 ARE RETURNED TO THE RECORDS DEPT/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
/CAL:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/X:COUNSEL STIPULATE THAT WHEN THE SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RECEIVED, THEY MAY BE RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE,/CONTD PRELIM HRG,DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/LD:01-04-10/
